channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Profile of Cole Tomas Allen, Suspected Attacker at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner
item.description: Cole Tomas Allen, a 31-year-old man from Torrance, California, has been arrested in connection with the shooting at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner. Online profiles indicate Allen is a highly e...

item.title: Sokoto East Senator Ibrahim Lamido Leaves APC Over Internal Party Conflicts
item.description: Ibrahim Lamido, the senator representing Sokoto East Senatorial District, don officially resign from the All Progressives Congress (APC). According to a letter wey e write on 22 April to the APC ward ...

item.title: U.S. GDP Growth Outpaces UK, EU, and Canada Due to Freer Markets
item.description: An opinion piece by J.D. Tuccille highlights how the United States is outpacing Britain, Europe, and Canada in economic prosperity despite policy challenges elsewhere. Drawing on data from the UK's In...

item.title: KZN Community Mourns Seven Family Members in State-Funded Funeral After Tragic Incident
item.description: A somber atmosphere descended upon the Stanger community in KwaZulu-Natal on Sunday as hundreds gathered for a mass funeral to commemorate seven family members who tragically lost their lives. The dec...

item.title: Concerns raised over Iranian embassy promoting wartime volunteer campaign to minors in Australia
item.description: A wartime volunteer campaign linked to Iran and promoted by its embassy in Canberra has sparked strong concern among Iranian Australians and national security observers. The initiative, known as ‘Janf...

item.title: London Marathon 2026: Tigst Assefa and Sabastian Sawe defend their titles in thrilling race
item.description: The 2026 London Marathon has captivated audiences as the world’s best athletes battle it out on the iconic course. Defending champions Sabastian Sawe and Tigst Assefa returned to London in a bid to ke...

item.title: Jodi Sta. Maria Shares Insights on Her Open Relationship with Son Thirdy
item.description: In a recent interview, actress Jodi Sta. Maria shared insights about her relationship with her son, Thirdy. She described their dynamic as open and communicative, highlighting how comfortable her son ...

item.title: Four people injured, one critically, in high-speed crash in south Ottawa
item.description: A high-speed crash in south Ottawa on April 25, 2026, resulted in four individuals being injured, with one of them in critical condition. Emergency services responded swiftly to the scene, where the v...

item.title: Conwill Bowie's journey from car crash survivor to lead role in 'Wolf In Sheep's Clothing'
item.description: Conwill Bowie's story is one of perseverance and transformation. After surviving a life-altering car accident, the actor from Belhar has turned his second chance into a thriving career in film. He is ...

item.title: Matty Juniosa shares reaction after receiving second Golden Buzzer on Britain’s Got Talent
item.description: Filipino singer Matty Juniosa recently expressed his reaction after earning his second Golden Buzzer on the international talent show 'Britain’s Got Talent.' The Golden Buzzer is a special recognition...

item.title: Concerns Over the Application of the Model Code of Conduct in Indian Elections
item.description: The Election Commission of India is facing criticism for its selective enforcement of the Model Code of Conduct during the ongoing West Bengal elections. While it has imposed strict restrictions such ...

item.title: Railway Board mandates nationwide audit of signalling systems to improve safety and reliability
item.description: The Indian Railways has initiated a comprehensive audit of signalling systems across its vast network, aiming to strengthen operational safety and improve the reliability of critical infrastructure. I...

item.title: Grok AI prefers Narendra Modi over Rahul Gandhi in hypothetical vote for Prime Minister
item.description: In a recent discussion on social media, users asked Grok, the AI chatbot, who it would hypothetically vote for if it were an Indian citizen. Despite its limitations as an AI, Grok chose Prime Minister...

item.title: Sabastian Sawe wins London Marathon with sub-two-hour performance
item.description: Kenyan runner Sabastian Sawe delivered a standout performance at the London Marathon, reportedly finishing the race in 1:59:30 and claiming victory. Breaking the two-hour barrier in a marathon setting...

item.title: Saudi envoy and Dangote discuss stronger investment ties between Nigeria and Saudi Arabia

item.title: Pioneering Machines Keep Donated Organs Alive Before Transplant
item.description: For the first time in Australia, the Austin Hospital in Melbourne has successfully performed a double transplant using pioneering organ perfusion technology. The procedure allowed a 51-year-old father...

item.title: Pakistani Exports Face Headwinds: GSP+ Benefits Offset by Conflict and Competition
item.description: Things aren't looking too rosy for Pakistani exporters at the moment, aye? The news is that our exports to Europe are slowing down, despite us still having that GSP+ status which gives us duty-free ac...

item.title: AFP vows to cooperate with any probe into Toboso clash
item.description: The Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) expressed their readiness to cooperate with any investigation regarding the recent encounter in Toboso, Negros Occidental. The AFP made this statement after c...
